creator: jb@cimlogic.com.au
text:
Lawrence D. Lopez wrote:
 >         cc -o thread thread.c -lc_r
 
 This is wrong. You are linking against both libc _and_ libc_r.
 Use -pthread instead of -lc_r.
 
 --
